description_long: This is a full-size, modern computer keyboard with a sleek, low-profile rectangular design. The keyboard features a standard array of keys, including a number pad on the right, function keys along the top, and a row of navigation keys. The surface is matte black, with slightly raised keycaps that appear to be made of durable plastic. The branding is subtly placed at the center of the front edge, and the overall build is slim and compact, with no visible cable or wireless receiver attached. The keyboard's construction suggests a solid plastic chassis, likely reinforced internally, and the underside is flat, allowing it to rest stably on flat surfaces.
description: A sleek, full-size black keyboard with a number pad and matte finish, featuring a modern, low-profile design and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard, including the branding at the center and the main key layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and the staggered arrangement of the keycaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge and the overall length, with the number pad visible on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the keyboard's thinness and the alignment of the keys from the side.
